beats.label: Opening
beats.speaker: Mentor
beats.text: At thirty-four, with nine months of runway and family planning on the horizon, we don't jump until we have designed the first test.

beats.label: Opening
beats.speaker: Sarcastic buddy
beats.text: You think it feels easy because your nine-month runway hasn't met a real customer or a baby diaper yet, so show me buyers.

beats.label: Opening
beats.speaker: 18-year-old you
beats.text: You are thirty-four, sitting on nine months of runway, bored by easy, and you said you did not want a safe life. Let’s jump.

beats.label: Opening
beats.speaker: Scared parents
beats.text: Nine months of savings disappears fast, and you are starting a family at thirty-four; please do not jump without a net.

beats.label: Rebuttal
beats.speaker: Mentor
beats.text: To eighteen-year-old me: Boredom isn't a strategy, and jumping blind risks the family we want. We build the net before we leap.

beats.label: Rebuttal
beats.speaker: Sarcastic buddy
beats.text: Eighteen-year-old me, you couldn't even afford a real beer, so stop pretending nine months of savings pays for diapers and server costs.

beats.label: Rebuttal
beats.speaker: 18-year-old you
beats.text: Parents, "safe" is how he ended up thirty-four and bored; nine months is an eternity to build freedom before the baby arrives.

beats.label: Rebuttal
beats.speaker: Scared parents
beats.text: Eighteen-year-old self, you don't have to pay for a baby's health insurance or mortgage, so stop telling us to jump into ruin.

beats.label: Verdict
beats.speaker: Council chair
beats.text: You have the hunger and the runway, but jumping without a validated market risks the very family stability you are planning to build.

verdict.decision: Do not quit yet; transition by securing your first paying customer while keeping your day job.
verdict.conditions: You must secure one recurring client or three pre-sales to prove market demand before resigning.
verdict.firstMove: Draft a landing page for your side project with a pre-order button and share it with ten potential customers.
